body.title: TestLaunchNextWorkerDispatch: mock Cortex in _run_launch to avoid live-DB sensitivity
body.result: Added Cortex+MemoryType mocks to _run_launch in commit 679e771f — routing tests now hermetic to DB state
body.description:
_run_launch did not mock Cortex in launch_next_worker. Live GOAL memories left by other tests caused the active-goal check to return early, skipping adopt_next_ticket, failing routing assertions.

**Affected files:** tests/test_worker_foreman.py (_run_launch method)
**Test plan:** no new tests — existing TestLaunchNextWorkerDispatch tests are the verification
**Scope boundary:** incidental fix committed alongside T-legacy-direct-claim-error (commit 679e771f)
